reforms.description: An Institute for assistance to small and medium-sized firms was established to provide technical assistance, consultancy services, and guaranteed loans for specific projects, aimed at supporting the reorganization and investment of these firms.
reforms.package_name: 1975 Small and Medium Enterprises Support Initiative
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing support to small and medium-sized enterprises, the initiative aims to enhance their productivity and innovation capacity, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The institute was set up to assist small and medium-sized firms.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the institute represents a significant effort to support a crucial segment of the economy, enhancing the capacity of small and medium-sized firms to innovate and grow.
reforms.source_quote: An Institute for assistance to small and medium-sized firms was set up in February 1975. This institute helps small and medium-sized firms... with reorganisation of work, conversion of activities and selection of new investment.
